notes: SHIP v1.14.232 — FORGE HUD slice 1: glass brand lockup + AMBIENT dimmer over the Stage-1 3D aisle. First slice of the vanilla-into-monolith HUD port (v3 spec as design bible; the React/R3F 10x build is visual reference only, NOT ported — incompatible with the single-file offline PWA). CHROME + ONE REAL CONTROL, zero fabricated telemetry (honesty-locked: no POWER kW / NETWORK TB/s / temps — those are simulated in the Kimi build and would lie to a tech). Scope A chosen by owner over Scope B (real-count system-status deferred to a later slice). CHANGES: (1) BRAND LOCKUP absorbed into the existing #forge3d-sheet header (no second stacked FORGE label) — title -> 'PHANTOM FORGE' cyan+glow / 'HYBRID AISLE' sub + a pulsing teal status dot; header gets a glass backdrop-blur. All restyle id-scoped to #forge3d-sheet so the SHARED .rd-sheet-* classes are untouched on every other sheet. (2) AMBIENT DIMMER — bottom-center glass panel (#forge3d-hud overlay, pointer-events:none except the dimmer), range slider with cyan->violet gradient track + live %. Slider drives forge3d_applyDim(pct): pct 0..100 -> factor 0.25..1.0 scaling the ambient(1.0)/15 row-point(0.8)/dir(0.5) light intensities IN PLACE (no re-render). Mapping is HONEST: 100 = the hand-tuned baseline ceiling (never invents extra brightness), 0 = atmospheric dim. Default 70 (moody, still gloved-legible per Cold Aisle Filter). buildLighting now keeps handles (_fDimAmb/_fDimPts[]/_fDimDir). LIFECYCLE: setDim is exposed on _forge3dActive; the top-level forge3d_dim(el) handler reaches the LIVE scene through it, so after teardown (_forge3dActive=null) a stale drag is a guarded no-op — no touch to a disposed GL context (mirrors the _forge3dActive single-context discipline). DEVIATIONS: (a) fog is NOT modulated this slice (lights-only — lower risk, keeps legibility); (b) no Framer-Motion glitch effect on the lockup (skipped gimmick); (c) HUD lives as a sibling OVER #forge3d-mount, not inside it, because forge3d_fail() does mount.innerHTML= and would wipe an inner HUD. HUD overlay is inside the body.rd-only sheet -> ?legacy=1 byte-identical with zero extra gating. Gates: node --check (sw.js + inline blocks), CSS braces balanced, CRLF preserved, three-stamp .231->.232. DEVICE-VERIFY (HARD STOP, John iPhone): (1) open SYS -> FORGE 3D; header reads 'PHANTOM FORGE / HYBRID AISLE' with a pulsing teal dot, glassy; (2) bottom-center AMBIENT slider present, clears the home indicator, cyan->violet track; (3) dragging it visibly dims/brightens the aisle in real time, 0 = moody dark, 100 = full baseline, default sits ~70; (4) orbit-drag and tap-to-focus still work THROUGH the HUD (slider is the only interactive bit); (5) close X still works; (6) rotate -> dimmer stays centered, no horizontal overflow; (7) ?legacy=1 unchanged. Batch: 1 owed (fresh batch after the .220-.231 pass verified clean). Next HUD slice (B): system-status 2x2 on REAL derivable Master counts.
